name: Baked Applesauce
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 cups cooking apples, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apples and peel them.
2. Core the apples and cut into 1-inch cubes.
3. Combine all ingredients in a glass loaf dish (apples stay moist in a loaf pan).
4. Pour juice mixture over the top of the apples.
5. Bake, uncovered, at 325°F for 45 minutes.
6. Remove from oven and cool.
7. Store in the refrigerator tightly covered. May be frozen. Makes 2 cups.
